# nxos_platform (Resource)

This resource can manage the platform configuration on NX-OS devices, including hardware profiles, TCAM regions, NVE platform settings, and extended platform entity configuration.

### API Documentation

- [platformEntity](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3AEntity/)
- [platformTcamRegion](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3ATcamRegion/)
- [platformTcamRegionExtended](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3ATcamRegionExtended/)
- [platformNVE](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3ANVE/)
- [platformInfraVlan](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3AInfraVlan/)
- [platformEntityExtended](https://pubhub.devnetcloud.com/media/dme-docs-10-5-3/docs/System/platform%3AEntityExtended/)

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "nxos_platform" "example" {
  nve_interfaces = {
    "1" = {
      ipmc_index_size = 4000
      infra_vlans = {
        "100" = {
          force = "Enable"
        }
      }
    }
  }
  extended_dme_load_interval = 300
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `access_list_match_inner_header` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware access-list match inner-header.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `acl_tap_aggregation` (String) Configure tap-aggregation feature.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `description` (String) Container to hold platform data of apps.
- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.
- `disable_parse_error` (String) Used to disable/enable hardware profile disable parse-err.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_acl_disable_redirect_share` (String) Disable acl redirect share.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_atomic_update` (String) To optimize enable/disable atomic update.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_atomic_update_strict` (String) Strict check on TCAM size for using mutliple features.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_counter_manager_bfd_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile BFD feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_ecn_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile ECN feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_egress_acl_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile EgrACL feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_bfd` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile BFD feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_ecn` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile ECN feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_egress_acl` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile EgrACL feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_ingress_acl` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile IngrACL feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_l2vni` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile L2VNI feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_l3vni` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile L3VNI feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_si` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile SI feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_svi` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile SVI feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_tunnel` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile Tunnel feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_vlan` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile VLAN feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_feature_voq` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile Voq feature.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_ingress_acl_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile IngrACL feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_l2vni_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile L2VNI feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_l3vni_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile L3VNI feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_si_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile SI feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_svi_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile SVI feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_tunnel_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile Tunnel feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_vlan_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile VLAN feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_counter_manager_voq_scale` (Number) Used to configure hardware profile Voq feature-scale.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_dme_load_interval` (Number) DME Load Interval.
  - Range: `0`-`4294967295`
- `extended_egress_l2_qos_ifacl_label_size` (String) To set the EGRESS IFACL QOS label size to 6 bits and the default value is 5 bits.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_gpe5_timer_enable` (Boolean) Gpe-5-timer enable/disable.
- `extended_hardware_qos_latency_optimized` (Boolean) Enable/Disable latency optimization.
- `extended_ingress_pacl_ifacl_label_size` (String) To set the ingress IFACL TCAM label size to 6 bits and the default value is 5 bits.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_ingress_vrf_nat_bd_label_width` (Number) To set the ingress Vrf NAT TCAM label size to user configured width of 0-6 bits.
  - Range: `0`-`6`
- `extended_mpls_qos_pipe_mode` (String) Fretta MPLS QoS Pipe Mode.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `extended_multicast_nlb_stick_port_channel` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile multicast nlb on a stick Port Channel configuration.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_multicast_priority` (Number) set mcast priority range based on user choice.
  - Range: `0`-`15`
- `extended_multicast_stats_disable` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile multicast stats-disable.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_pbr_ecmp_paths` (Number) Policy Based Routing ECMP Paths limit.
  - Range: `1`-`64`
- `extended_pbr_fast_convergence` (String) Policy-Based Routing Fast Convergence.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_pbr_match_default_route` (String) set pbr match default route.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_ptp_correction_hardware` (Boolean) Ptp frequnecy correction from hardware or software.
- `extended_si_flex_stats` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile sub-interface flex-stats.
  - Choices: `disable`, `l3`, `l2`
- `extended_stats_template` (String) Used to enable stats on given template on S1.
  - Choices: `l3qos`, `racl`, `span-acl`, `pbr`
- `extended_storm_control_priority` (String) storm control priority.
  - Choices: `default`, `drop-l3`, `drop-l2`, `drop-all`
- `extended_tcam_default_result` (String) Default access-list result during non-atomic hardware update.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `extended_udf_netflow_rtp_multicast_enabled` (Boolean) Enable/Disable RTP for Munticast-flow on enable/disable.
- `extended_vrf_aware_nat_enable` (String) Configure Vrf Aware Nat.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `global_tx_span` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware multicast global tx span.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `hardware_lou_resource_threshold` (Number) Hardware Lou Resource Threshold value.
  - Range: `1`-`50`
- `high_multicast_priority` (String) high mcast priority.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `ingress_bd_ifacl_label_optimization` (String) To optimize the ingress QOS Ingress BD IFACL label size.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `ingress_racl_size` (String) To set the ingress RACL TCAM label size to 9 bits and the default value is 6 bits.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `ingress_replication_round_robin` (Boolean) Round-Robin hashing of underlay-paths for VXLAN ingress-replication peers.
- `ip_statistics` (String) Used to disable/enable hardware forwarding ip statistics.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `ipv6_alpm_carve_value` (Number) Hardware profile ipv6 alpm carve-value.
  - Range: `0`-`4096`
- `ipv6_lpm_max_entries` (Number) Maximum limit for IPv6 LPM routes.
  - Range: `0`-`6144`
- `lpm_max_limit` (Number) Maximum limit for LPM routes.
  - Range: `0`-`4096`
- `mld_snooping` (String) Used to enable/disable system mld snooping.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `mpls_adjacency_stats_mode` (String) Corresponds to MPLS Adjacency stats type.
  - Choices: `PACKETS`, `BYTES`
- `mpls_ecmp_mode` (String) Used to enable/disable extended-ecmp for MPLS on RX-series Linecards N9K.
  - Choices: `invalid`, `disable`, `enable`
- `mrouting_disable_l2_update` (String) Corresponds to enabling/disabling l2 update.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `mrouting_disable_second_route_update` (String) Corresponds to enabling/disabling second route update.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `mrouting_performance_mode` (String) Corresponds to enabling/disabling mrouting performance mode.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `multicast_dcs_check` (String) Used to enable/disable system mcast DCS check.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `multicast_flex_stats` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile multicast flex-stats.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `multicast_lpm_max_entries` (Number) Maximum limit for multicast LPM routes.
  - Range: `0`-`4096`
- `multicast_max_limit` (Number) Maximum limit for multicast LPM routes.
  - Range: `0`-`8000`
- `multicast_nlb` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile multicast nlb.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `multicast_racl_bridge` (String) Apply permit/drop for mcast bridged pkt.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `multicast_rpf_check_optimization` (String) mcast rpf check optimization.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `multicast_service_reflect_port` (Number) mcast service-reflect port.
  - Range: `0`-`48`
- `multicast_syslog_threshold` (Number) Specifies to generate a syslog entry when the specified maximum buffer size is exceeded for multicast cases. The default is 90 percent of the total available shared buffer.
  - Range: `1`-`100`
- `nve_interfaces` (Attributes Map) NVE platform configuration.
  - Map key: `id` - Int nve.
  - Key range: `0`-`65535` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nve_interfaces))
- `openflow_forward_pdu` (String) Configure openflow forward-pdu.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `pbr_skip_self_ip` (String) Configure Skipping PBR for self-ip packets.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `pic_core_enable` (String) Configure PIC core.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `port_channel_fast_convergence` (String) Port-channel Fast Convergence.
  - Choices: `enable`, `disable`
- `port_channel_load_balance_algorithm` (String) Pc load-balance internal algorithm.
  - Choices: `PC_LB_ALGO_DLB`, `PC_LB_ALGO_RTAG7`, `PC_LB_ALGO_RTAG7_MURMUR`, `PC_LB_ALGO_RTAG7_LOCAL_CRC`, `PC_LB_ALGO_DYNAMIC_PIN`
- `port_channel_load_balance_resilient` (String) Pc load-balance resilient.
  - Choices: `yes`, `no`
- `port_channel_mpls_load_balance_label_ip` (String) Mpls load-balance label ip.
  - Choices: `DEFAULT`, `LABEL_IP`
- `port_channel_mpls_load_balance_label_only` (String) Mpls load-balance label only.
  - Choices: `DEFAULT`, `LABEL_ONLY`
- `port_channel_scale_fanout` (String) Port-channel Scale Fanout.
  - Choices: `enable`, `disable`
- `profile_front_port_mode` (String) Hardware profile front portmode for platform entity.
  - Choices: `sfp-plus`, `qsfp`
- `profile_mode` (String) Hardware profile mode for platform entity.
  - Choices: `Default`, `QS_PORT_MODE_64X10G`, `QS_PORT_MODE_48X10G_4X40G`, `QS_PORT_MODE_52X10G_3X40g`, `QS_PORT_MODE_56X10G_2X40G`, `QS_PORT_MODE_60X10G_1X40G`, `QS_PORT_MODE`, `QG_PORT_MODE_32X10G_8X40G`, `QG_PORT_MODE_16X40G`, `QG_PORT_MODE_16X10G_12X40G`, `QG_PORT_MODE_8X10G_14X40G`, `NEP_PORT_MODE_32X40G`, `NEP_PORT_MODE_24X40G`, `NEP_PORT_MODE_26X40G`, `NEP_PORT_MODE_32X40G_FIXED`, `QI2_PORT_MODE_72X10G`, `QI2_PORT_MODE_48X10G_6x40G`, `QI2_PORT_MODE_BKOUT`, `DV_PORT_MODE_48X25G_4X100G`, `DV_PORT_MODE_48X25G_2X100G_4X40G`, `PB_PORT_MODE_48X10G_6X100G`, `PB_PORT_MODE_48X10G_4X100G_2X40G`, `FOST_PORT_MODE_28X40G_4X100G`, `FOST_PORT_MODE_18X100G`, `FOST_PORT_MODE_24X40G_6X100G`, `TET_PORT_MODE_64X100G`, `TET_PORT_MODE_96X25G_32X100G`, `TET_PORT_MODE_128X25G`, `CMR_PORT_MODE_128X100G_32X400G`, `CMR_PORT_MODE_160X25G_8X100G`, `CMR_PORT_MODE_128X100G_30X400G_2X200G`
- `profile_tuple` (String) Profile tuple for platform entity.
  - Choices: `Disable`, `Enable`
- `pstat_configuration` (String) pstat enable.
  - Choices: `PSTAT_DISABLE`, `PSTAT_ENABLE`, `PSTAT_ENABLE_PEAK`
- `qos_min_buffer` (String) qos min-buffer qos-group.
  - Choices: `all`, `none`, `default`
- `routing_mode` (String) Routing mode.
  - Choices: `DEFAULT`, `NON_HIER_DEFAULT`, `NON_HIER_MAX_L3`, `MAX_HOST`, `TOR_MAX_L3`, `DEFAULT_64B`, `NON_HIER_MAX_L3_64B`, `TOR_MAX_L3_64B`, `TOR_MAX_L2`, `TOR_MAX_L2L3`, `TOR_TEMPLATE_OVL_HOST_SCALE`, `TEMPLATE_LPM_HEAVY`, `TOR_TEMPLATE_LPM_SCALE_V6_64`, `TOR_TEMPLATE_DUAL_STACK_HOST_SCALE`, `TEMPLATE_SERVICE_PROVIDER`, `TEMPLATE_MULTICAST_HEAVY`, `TEMPLATE_VXLAN_SCALE`, `TEMPLATE_MPLS_SCALE`, `TEMPLATE_INTERNET_PEERING`, `TEMPLATE_MULTICAST_EXT_HEAVY`, `TEMPLATE_L3_HEAVY`, `TEMPLATE_MULTICAST_DUAL_STACK`, `TEMPLATE_L2_HEAVY`, `TEMPLATE_L2_SCALE`, `TEMPLATE_SECURITY_GROUPS`
- `service_template_name` (String) Name of the user-defined service template.
- `svi_and_si_flex_stats` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile sviandsi flex-stats.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `svi_flex_stats` (String) Used to enable/disable hardware profile si flex-stats.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `switch_mode` (String) Corresponds to the switch mode(N3K/N9K).
  - Choices: `default`, `n3k`, `n9k`
- `switching_fabric_speed` (String) Corresponds to the switching fabric speed.
  - Choices: `default`, `fabric-speed-40g`
- `switching_mode` (String) Corresponds to the global switching mode. Default is cut-through.
  - Choices: `DEFAULT`, `STORE_FORWARD`, `CUT_THROUGH`
- `system_fabric_mode` (String) Corresponds to the system fabric mode.
  - Choices: `full-rate`, `default`
- `tcam_region_arp_acl_size` (Number) ARP ACL TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_copp_size` (Number) Ingress Copp TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_copp_system_size` (Number) Copp System TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_ipv6_qos_size` (Number) Egress IPV6 Qos TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_ipv6_racl_size` (Number) Egress IPv6 RACL TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_mac_qos_size` (Number) Egress Mac Qos TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_qos_lite_size` (Number) Egress Qos Lite TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_qos_size` (Number) Egress Qos TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_egress_racl_size` (Number) Egress RACL TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`15`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

- `tcam_region_extended_racl_all_per_port_stats` (Boolean) racl-all region with per-port-stats.

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`

  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_racl_udf_size` (Number) IPV4 RACL SPAN UDF TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_sup_size` (Number) SUP TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_svi_size` (Number) Ingress SVI Counters TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_tcp_nat_size` (Number) TCP NAT TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`100`
- `tcam_region_vacl_lite_size` (Number) VACL Lite TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_vacl_size` (Number) Virtual ACL TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_vlan_qos_intra_lite_size` (Number) VLAN QoS Intra Lite TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_vlan_qos_size` (Number) VLAN QoS TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_vpc_convergence_size` (Number) VPC TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_region_vxlan_p2p_size` (Number) VXLAN P2P TCAM region size.
  - Range: `0`-`2147483647`
- `tcam_syslog_threshold` (Number) Specifies to generate a syslog entry when the specified maximum buffer size is exceeded for TCAM. The default is 90 percent of the total available shared buffer.
  - Range: `1`-`100`
- `unicast_max_limit` (Number) Maximum limit for unicast LPM routes.
  - Range: `0`-`8000`
- `unicast_syslog_threshold` (Number) Specifies to generate a syslog entry when the specified maximum buffer size is exceeded for unicast cases. The default is 90 percent of the total available shared buffer.
  - Range: `1`-`100`
- `unicast_trace` (String) Used to enable/disable unicast trace.
  - Choices: `disable`, `enable`
- `unknown_unicast_flood` (String) Hardware flood post-routed traffic on SVI if dest-mac->layer2-port binding unknown.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `urpf_status` (String) Unicast Reverse Path Forwarding Status.
  - Choices: `enabled`, `disabled`
- `wrr_unicast_bandwidth` (Number) WRR Unicast Bandwidth Value.
  - Range: `0`-`100`

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The distinguished name of the object.

<a id="nestedatt--nve_interfaces"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nve_interfaces`

Optional:

- `infra_vlans` (Attributes Map) InfraVlan configuration.
  - Map key: `id` - Id for all vlans that are infravlan enabled.
  - Key range: `0`-`4096` (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nve_interfaces--infra_vlans))
- `ipmc_index_size` (Number) Global ipmc index size.
  - Range: `0`-`7000`
- `overlay_vlan_id` (String) Nve overlay vlan id range.

<a id="nestedatt--nve_interfaces--infra_vlans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nve_interfaces.infra_vlans`

Optional:

- `force` (String) Force flag if infra vlan added by force.
  - Choices: `Disable`, `Enable`

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

In Terraform v1.12.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `identity` attribute, for example:

```terraform
import {
  to       = nxos_platform.example
  identity = {}
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
### Identity Schema


#### Optional

- `device` (String) A device name from the provider configuration.

In Terraform v1.5.0 and later, the [`import` block](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/language/import) can be used with the `id` attribute, for example:

```terraform
# Terraform's `import` block requires a non-empty `id` value, so this format cannot be used to
# import nxos_platform for the default device. Use the `terraform import` command
# below, or identity-based import shown above, instead.
```

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import nxos_platform.example ""
```
